text:
I have tested this patch. I approved it.
Please put patch-wiki-server-moin.fcgi file into files directory.

--- patch-wiki-server-moin.fcgi begins here ---

+++ wiki/server/moin.fcgi       2010-04-28 16:33:04.097920979 +0800
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-#!/usr/bin/python
+#!/usr/bin/env python
 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
 """
